clips.script: YEAH!
SO GOOD!
TOOOAD!
WHOA!
BIG!
LET'S GOOO!
NICE!
BANGER!
*(airhorn)*
WOOO!
CLASSIC!
MY JAM!
I LOVE IT!
TOAD APPROVES!
You're in The BLENDER! HITZ 99.5! All the hits, all at once!
It's Jamie and The Toad and this is HITZ 99.5, The Blender!
This weekend at Cyber Zone Internet Café: LAN party 'til 2 A.M.! Bring your OWN tower! Your MOM can't come! Cyber Zone!
Ringtone Bonanza dot com! Turn YOUR phone into a PARTY! Standard messaging rates DEFINITELY apply!
It's a GORGEOUS morning in The Blender and here come The Sunroofs — 'Backseat Sunrise' — windows DOWN, people, certified summer banger—
The Sunroofs just pulled into the fast lane with the windows DOWN — this is 'Backseat Sunrise,' your officially unofficial road-trip anthem—
Traffic report: sun is UP, snacks are OPEN, and The Sunroofs are taking over every speaker in the car — 'Backseat Sunrise'—
The Sunroofs, everybody! Best days of our LIVES and it's not even nine A.M.!
That was The Sunroofs! If your windows are still up, we have FAILED you personally!
Okaaay we're going up to the CLOUDS — DJ Contrail, the guy who plays behind a wall of fog, we've NEVER seen his face — 'Paper Plane Pulse'—
Nobody has ever seen DJ Contrail's face, but somebody keeps cashing his checks — turn the fog machine ALL the way up for 'Paper Plane Pulse'—
Headlights ON, hands in the air — actually, driver, hands on the WHEEL — DJ Contrail is cleared for takeoff with 'Paper Plane Pulse'—
DJ Contrail! Still foggy, still a total mystery, we LOVE a man of secrets!
This is the ORIGINAL, the queen herself, Britney Alexandra — 'Text Me Back Or Else' — and if he doesn't text back, that's HIS loss—
The request line is MELTING DOWN — Britney Alexandra has one message, one flip phone, and absolutely NO patience — 'Text Me Back Or Else'—
Team Britney, make some NOISE! Britney Alexandra is checking the screen, checking it AGAIN, and giving him exactly one chorus to respond—
Britney Alexandra! Text her back or she is GONE — moving on — NEXT!
Britney Alexandra! Message delivered, patience expired, number DELETED!
Now here's the SUNNY one — Mandy Sincere doing 'Text Me Back' — same demand, twice the sparkle, sunglasses ON—
If sunshine had a ringtone, it would be Mandy Sincere — same message, maximum sparkle — 'Text Me Back Or Else'—
Team Mandy, this is YOUR round! Mandy Sincere brought three backup dancers and enough glitter to block the signal—
Mandy Sincere! So bright I can't even SEE! Somebody dim her!
Mandy Sincere! The message is SENT, the glitter is EVERYWHERE, and we are not getting that deposit back!
Whoa whoa WHOA — we're doing it — BACK to BACK — Britney Alexandra VERSUS Mandy Sincere, SAME song, and YOU decide who did it better — ring the bell!
Stop the presses and FLIP open your phones — two artists, one song, zero patience! Britney Alexandra versus Mandy Sincere, back to back!
The Blender Battle is ON! Same title, two completely different levels of sparkle — Britney versus Mandy, and YOU are the judge!
Round one is in the BOOKS! Keep your scorecard out because contender number two is stepping up RIGHT now!
Do not touch that dial — version two is loading! Same demand, brand-new attitude, and the judges are already yelling!
That's BOTH versions! Britney Alexandra and Mandy Sincere went back to back — you heard the evidence, now pick your winner!
Battle COMPLETE! Two divas entered, two divas also left because that is how radio works — tell us who won!
DJ Nokia coming in HOT — every single beat in this is a PHONE sound, I'm not kidding — 'Snake Charmer'—
Check your flip phone — no, seriously, that buzzing is IN the song — DJ Nokia with 'Snake Charmer, Ringtone Remix'—
DJ Nokia made an entire track out of beeps, buzzes, and one voicemail from his MOM — this is 'Snake Charmer'—
DJ Nokia! And YES that ringtone's for sale and YES it costs MORE than the song!
DJ Nokia! Please stop checking your phone — the beep is part of the SONG!
We are required by LAW to play one country song a day and HERE it is — Colt Maddox, 'Last Time' — he SWEARS it's the last time, it is NEVER the last time—
Colt Maddox has returned with the same truck, the same boots, and a completely NEW promise that this is the 'Last Time'—
Somebody left a cowboy hat in the studio, so legally we have to play Colt Maddox — 'Last Time'—
Colt Maddox! He'll be right back next hour doing it all AGAIN!
Colt Maddox! That was the last time until the NEXT last time!
Ooh this one gets MOODY — Kilowatt Youth, 'Halogen Lamps' — I'm PRETTY sure it's about two robots falling in love—
Dim the dashboard, activate your feelings — Kilowatt Youth wrote a love song for appliances and somehow it WORKS — 'Halogen Lamps'—
Kilowatt Youth! Nothing lasts forever EXCEPT that chorus stuck in my HEAD!
FROSTED! TIPS! FOREVER! The O.C. Parking Lot — named after a parking lot they have never actually BEEN to—
Grab the hair gel and prepare to feel EVERYTHING — The O.C. Parking Lot with 'Frosted Tips Forever'—
They have never seen the O.C., but they HAVE seen the inside of a salon — 'Frosted Tips Forever' from The O.C. Parking Lot—
The O.C. Parking Lot! Get your L.A. Looks on — we're not crying, YOU'RE crying!
BLUE! BLUE! BLUE! You know the code! Mall pop-punk royalty Kacie Vandal — 'Parking Lot Codes'—
Level three, blue section, next to the food court — Kacie Vandal remembers EXACTLY where you parked with 'Parking Lot Codes'—
Kacie Vandal is banned from two malls and headlining a third — this is 'Parking Lot Codes'—
Kacie Vandal! I don't KNOW the code but I'm screaming it in the food court anyway!
More Kacie Vandal and OH this one's a WEEPER — 'Broken Link' — grab a napkin, dab those eyes—
Kacie Vandal clicked refresh on this relationship for the LAST time — grab the emergency food-court napkins for 'Broken Link'—
Kacie Vandal, 'Broken Link.' We were SO CLOSE! It's fine! I'm fine!
Two people, ONE massive sound — The Tin Kings, 'Don't Follow Me' — the drummer and guitarist MIGHT be siblings, they will NOT confirm it—
The Tin Kings brought one guitar, one drum kit, and zero answers about whether they're related — 'Don't Follow Me'—
The Tin Kings! That riff is gonna live in your skull, rent-FREE!

script.text: [bright, caffeinated, highly expressive 2000s pop-radio delivery] The Tin Kings came back with one guitar, one drum kit, and a breakup big enough to knock down a MOUNTAIN — 'I Was a Mountain'—
[bright, caffeinated, highly expressive 2000s pop-radio delivery] They survived the riff, lost the crown, and somehow made the wreckage sound MASSIVE — The Tin Kings with 'I Was a Mountain'—
[loud, punchy, dopey end blurt] ALWAYS YOU!

clips.script: [bright, punchy pop-radio back-announce with a smile] The Tin Kings with 'I Was a Mountain!' Turns out the mountain was feelings, and the feelings had AMPLIFIERS!
Kick your shoes OFF — this is Marlowe Kai, he records everything in a HAMMOCK — 'Passwords,' so chill it's basically a nap—
Marlowe Kai recorded this one barefoot, outdoors, and dangerously close to a sprinkler — 'Passwords'—
Your password needs one number, one symbol, and one extremely relaxed surfer — Marlowe Kai with 'Passwords'—
Marlowe Kai! He knows all your passwords now! ...That's the whole song! It's CUTE!
WARNING: this next one is dangerously catchy — Copper Avenue, 'Every Time I Close My Eyes' — you WILL hum it, there is no escape—
Copper Avenue put a hook in this song so sticky it should come with a warning label — 'Every Time I Close My Eyes'—
Copper Avenue! It's STUCK in there now! You're welcome! Or... sorry!
Big lights, BIG feelings — The Velvet Casino, straight outta Vegas, the singer wears ONE sequined glove — 'Forever and Ever'—
The Velvet Casino just arrived with a spotlight, a wind machine, and that ONE mysterious glove — 'Forever and Ever'—
The Velvet Casino! Forever and EVER! Nobody knows about the glove — nobody ASKS!
Crank it UP — Cheap Halo, 'Moon' — every song they've got is about the moon, or a girl, sometimes BOTH—
Cheap Halo checked the forecast and, yes, the moon is still UP there — here is another song about it, conveniently titled 'Moon'—
Cheap Halo! See you on the MOON! ...We won't, but it's a nice thought!
Get in the CAR — this is Archduke, art-school dance-punk, named after a historical event they cannot SPELL — 'Drive'—
Archduke has a full tank, half a map, and absolutely NO idea where they're going — perfect conditions for 'Drive'—
Art school! Dance floor! Historical name they still cannot explain! Archduke is taking the wheel with 'Drive'—
Archduke! We can drive ALL night! Toad's got his learner's permit!
Archduke! Pull over, switch seats, and do NOT let Toad parallel park!
Okay this one's SNEAKY — Della Sky, 'Through Your Eyes' — sounds like the happiest song ever, then you read the lyrics and OOF—
Della Sky wrapped a heartbreak in sunshine and hoped we wouldn't NOTICE — we noticed! 'Through Your Eyes'—
Della Sky! Happiest sad song of the YEAR! I need a minute! ...A HAPPY minute!
Uh-oh — Weather Toad says RAIN! Watch those windows, road-trippers!
NEW YORK, baby! The city so nice they named it ONCE!
Washington D.C.! Where the important people make the important DECISIONS!
Look at all that CORN! Toad, wave to the cows!
The DESERT! Zero bars of signal! How is ANYONE gonna text back?!
L.A.! Everyone here is famous! Allegedly!
San Francisco! Mind the FOG and the HILLS!
SKATEBOARD unlocked! That is SO extreme of you!
MOTORCYCLE?! Okay big shot — look at YOU!
